findings.description: PDF page-1 footer (agency address and phone number) is inserted mid-content in the HTML body, between the table of contents and Section I, breaking reading flow.
findings.evidence: HTML contains a <footer> block with 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Management / 1646 Mail Service Center | 217 West Jones Street | Raleigh, 27699-1646 / 919 707 8200' positioned between the closing </nav> of the TOC and the <h2 id="history-background"> heading. In the PDF this text appears only as the page-1 bottom footer, not between body content sections.
